title: Thoughts and Things 9/11/2024 — Shanghai third day of class
html:
TL;DR

  • Sept 11, 2024 Shanghai journal — third day of classes at the CIEE / Shanghai program. "Class continues to feel like a fight but this isn't something I shy away from."
  • Heading to meet program director Jia Ma after "China's Macroeconomic Impact" class.
  • "100 day plan is dwindling" — names a personal countdown / sprint structure.
  • Crystallizes the four pillars of the China chapter: Chinese language (majority focus), App (likely Brotein or pre-Brotein build), Working out, Social.
  • Closes with the slow down and look straight move: "Don't look at it fuzzy, slow it down and look straight at it."

Notes

A short but operationally clean journal — names the four pillar weekly structure Yahir was running in Shanghai. Mandarin study positioned as the majority of attention, with App / Workout / Social as the maintenance loops.

The "fight but I don't shy away" framing is the same voluntary adversity reflex that shows up across the China-chapter notes — class is hard, that's the point. The 100-day plan reference is one of the few dated artifacts of how Yahir was structuring time in Shanghai (not in vault elsewhere — flag for densify if 100-day-plan recurs).

Jia Ma is the program director — first explicit mention in the vault; warrants a stub at this significance level (named adult in the CIEE administrative chain who Yahir is having direct meetings with).

Connections

  • china chapter · shanghai study abroad — the chapter
  • shanghai · ciee · mandarin 3 — program / place / language
  • jia ma — newly stubbed director
  • the china chapter as comparative anthropology — synthesis

Privacy

  • No PII, no secrets.
